artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA faceplate for 'Knife Gate No.1' displaying an active 'Actuator Fault Alarm' in the alarms panel.
artifact_blurb: A detailed screenshot of an industrial SCADA (Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition) operator interface, specifically the faceplate for 'Knife Gate No.1'. The interface includes a standard toolbar with navigation controls and a dedicated alarms panel where a critical 'Actuator Fault Alarm' is prominently highlighted in orange, indicating a system fault requiring immediate attention.
